sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 101:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 101:1
items.html: The lights that came during the Gadlut as additions, and are not from their primary essence, are called posterior. (Inner Light, Item 32)
